extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR won La Flèche Wallonne on the final Mur de Huy climb, holding off a fast-closing SKJELMOSE by a narrow margin after UAE controlled all day.
tactical_patterns: UAE committed entire team to tempo control despite having single protected rider, revealing defensive one-leader strategy worked.
VERVAEKE Louis bridged from breakaway to lead group entering final Mur, indicating Soudal's willingness to sacrifice breakaway positioning.
SHEFFIELD Magnus led penultimate section for INEOS despite no protected climber present, exposing team's lack of GC firepower.
BARDET Romain squeezed wide by WOODS Michael when attempting outside attack, showing inside line critical on narrow Mur.
SKJELMOSE Mattias nearly caught seated POGAČAR at line despite youth, signaling Trek's emerging stage race climbing depth.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: won seated and calm off steepest bend but margin tighter than Amstel, suggesting Mur suits him less
rider_signals.SKJELMOSE Mattias: positive: second place as youngster closing fast on winner shows readiness for protected leadership in Ardennes
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: third place ahead of Woods shows sustained Mur power despite age and team chaos
rider_signals.KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren: positive: strongest from eight-rider break, distanced peloton riders Zimmerman and Vervaeke before final circuit
rider_signals.VERVAEKE Louis: positive: bridged from break to lead group onto Mur, demonstrating tactical aggression over pure placement
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: neutral: fourth but unintentionally blocked Bardet's outside attack, compromising teammate positioning
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: positive: fifth gives Trek two top-five finishes with different rider types, exposing depth in punchy climbs
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: negative: crashed one lap to go after EF committed resources, eliminating team's protected option prematurely
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: negative: invisible after EF paced earlier, suggesting team misjudged his Mur form after committing domestiques
rider_signals.ULISSI Diego: neutral: UAE domestique exhausted before finale with only Hirschi remaining, showing narrow team survival margin
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: squeezed wide when attacking outside line, tactical error cost positioning on decisive gradient
